dialogueChunks.intro: The storehouse is full, {player_name}. Fuller than before I took from it, actually.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} conducted the audit and found everything in order: plus a surplus. They closed the investigation. The neighbor's children recovered with the medicine you brought. Their mother came to my door crying, saying she'd pray for whoever helped. {quest_focus} stayed secret, and no one suffered for it.
dialogueChunks.outro: No one was punished. No one went hungry. Take this: it's all I can offer for helping me keep a secret that saved a family.

playerResponses.text: Some secrets are worth keeping. Take care of your neighbors.
A surplus in the storehouse and healthy children. Best kind of ending.
You got lucky. Don't make a habit of it.

dialogueChunks.intro: They made it, {player_name}. The soldier is safe.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The route was clear, the provisions held, and {quest_focus} reached the settlement on the other side. New name, new life, working as a carpenter. {target_npc} eventually closed the investigation, saying the trail went cold. {quest_stakes} never came to pass, and sometimes good people in authority know when to stop looking.
dialogueChunks.outro: A person with a conscience is alive because you cleared a path through the wilderness. My sister wanted you to have this.

playerResponses.text: A carpenter with a clear conscience. That's a good second life.
Your sister's courage saved a life. Give her my respects.

dialogueChunks.intro: The cottage is working beautifully, {player_name}. Better than the old setup, honestly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've been brewing {quest_focus} for three weeks without interruption. Fourteen people treated, seven fully recovered, and {quest_threat} hasn't found so much as a footprint. {target_npc} actually came to me with a sick friend, not knowing I was the one they'd been hunting. I treated the friend. No charge, same as always.
dialogueChunks.outro: You built the foundation for a hidden clinic that saves lives the system refuses to value. This remedy is for you, and this payment comes with the gratitude of everyone I've healed.

playerResponses.text: A hidden healer doing what the guild won't. The world needs more like you.
Fourteen people treated, seven cured. Keep going. I'll keep quiet.
